heading: Review of programs
label: 2441 Review of programs
notes: Amendments2010—Subsec. (a). inserted “, the Attorney General,” after “the Secretary of the Interior” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 111–211
amendments: Amendments2010—Subsec. (a). inserted “, the Attorney General,” after “the Secretary of the Interior” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 111–211

children.heading: Law enforcement and judicial services
children.label: a Law enforcement and judicial services

children.text: the various programs established by Federal law providing law enforcement or judicial services for Indian tribes, and
tribal and State and local law enforcement and judicial programs and systems

children.heading: Dissemination of review
children.label: b Dissemination of review
children.text: The results of the review conducted pursuant to subsection (a) shall be made available to every Indian tribe as soon as possible for their consideration and use in the development and modification of a Tribal Action Plan.
